channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nvidia's Strategic Moves in Japan's AI and Manufacturing Sector
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's two-day visit to Tokyo solidified partnerships across Japan's tech ecosystem, including a national AI factory, robotics collaborations, and chip supply agreements. The deal m...

item.title: KICC Security Forces Phone Unlock Checks Amid Stolen Device Reports
item.description: During the World Cup 2026 final watch party at Kenyatta International Convention Centre, security personnel ordered attendees to unlock their phones before exiting after reports of stolen devices emer...

item.title: Sokoto Rainstorm Causes Fatalities and Property Damage
item.description: A deadly rainstorm hit Sokoto State's Kware Local Government Area, claiming four lives and injuring several others. The storm destroyed numerous houses and damaged critical infrastructure like a prima...

item.title: How Mirroring Successful Products Can Enhance User Engagement
item.description: The article discusses the concept of 'mirroring' successful products to create solutions tailored for different user needs. It uses examples like protein-rich namkeen or tea for adults and an On-Call ...

item.title: One Nation and Labor Conference in Focus
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing political focus on the One Nation party and its leader Pauline Hanson, following the recent broadcast of the Seven Network's Spotlight programme featuring Hanson. It ...

item.title: How Associations Advocate for Members' Interests
item.description: The article explores the role of non-profit associations in Canada, emphasizing their critical function in representing communities of practice and advocating for their members. Associations serve as ...

item.title: NBI probes Cayetano over 2019 SEA Games procurement issues
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) is probing Senator Alan Peter Cayetano over alleged irregularities in the 2019 Southeast Asian Games (SEA Games) hosting. Cayetano, who chaired the Philippin...

item.title: FDA expands recall of Taylor Farms lettuce linked to Cyclospora outbreak
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) confirmed that a sample of shredded iceberg lettuce from Taylor Farms de Mexico tested positive for Cyclospora, a microscopic parasite causing severe gastro...

item.title: U.S.-China Competition in Africa: Tanzania's Strategic Balance
item.description: The article analyzes the shifting dynamics of U.S.-China influence in Africa, highlighting how President Trump's dismissive approach to African diplomacy has created opportunities for Chinese economic...

item.title: Quebec officials warn of increased wildfire risk due to extreme weather conditions
item.description: Montreal authorities have expressed concern that prolonged periods of sunny and windy weather could exacerbate existing forest fire risks across Quebec. The warning comes as emergency services prepare...

item.title: Andy Burnham appointed UK prime minister following Keir Starmer's resignation
item.description: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the UK's new prime minister after King Charles III accepted his resignation from Keir Starmer, who stepped down amid leadership scandals. Burnham, 56, will face imme...

item.title: Trump Claims Credit for Giant Eagle's Summer Price Reductions, Prompting Online Criticism
item.description: President Donald Trump drew criticism after claiming credit for a summer price reduction campaign announced by Giant Eagle, a regional grocery chain based in Pittsburgh. The retailer said it would low...

item.title: AFL Legend Mick Malthouse Testifies in Home Invasion Case
item.description: Former AFL coach Mick Malthouse, now 72, recounted a chaotic home invasion incident during his court appearance. On September 4, 2025, three men allegedly attempted to break into his East Melbourne re...

item.title: Susan Del Percio: Political Strategist and Media Analyst with 30 Years of Experience
item.description: Susan Del Percio is a seasoned political strategist and crisis communications consultant with over 30 years of experience in politics, government, and media. She has worked with high-profile figures l...

item.title: Trump criticises Canada over wildfire smoke impacting U.S. air quality
item.description: President Donald Trump has accused Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney of failing to control wildfires in Canada, which have caused severe smog and air pollution in the United States. During a meeting...

item.title: Spain's tactical mastery ends Argentina's Messi-dependent World Cup dream
item.description: Argentina's historic reliance on Lionel Messi to carry them through the FIFA World Cup 2026 came crashing down in the final against Spain. The South American giants, who had stunned teams like Egypt a...

item.title: US Imposes Sanctions on Sudan Amid Chemical Weapons Allegations
item.description: The US State Department has imposed new sanctions on the Sudanese government, accusing it of using chemical weapons in its conflict with rival paramilitary groups. The sanctions target the army-aligne...

item.title: Philippines Condemns China’s AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. expressed strong condemnation of an AI-generated video posted by Chinese state media that depicted Filipinos as monkeys, calling it dehumanizing and racist. Palace Press...

item.title: Spain removes Trump from World Cup celebration photo amid global mockery
item.description: Spain's national football team sparked international reactions after sharing an official photo of their World Cup victory celebration without U.S. President Donald Trump, who had been present during t...

item.title: Portable Challenges Terry G to Boxing Match, Aims to Revive His Career
item.description: Nigerian singer Habeeb Okikiola, known as Portable, has challenged fellow artist Terry G to a celebrity boxing match, claiming the fight would revive Terry G's career. The challenge came during a tele...
